subcodes.first_line: Hearken unto that which is revealed unto thee from this Tree upon this blessed spot from this Fire [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فاستمع ما یوحی الیک من هذه الشجره علی هذه البقعه المبارکه من هذه النار
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @station of the Manifestation of God, @power of the Manifestation of God, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha
